news.title: Trump threatens to seize Kharg Island and other Iran oil infrastructure
news.summary: Trump said the U.S. would take over Iran's oil infrastructure, and its oil and gas markets. He said the operations would be similar to those in Venezuela, where the United States is trying to take over the oil industry.

news.title: Iran threatens Elon Musk's companies in Middle East: Iranian state media
news.summary: Iran will consider all of Elon Musk's companies in the Middle East as military targets as it retaliates against the U.S., Iranian state media reported.

news.title: Gold slumps to 6-month low even as inflation fears rise. Here's why bullion is out of favor
news.summary: The yellow metal is at lowest level of the year as potential interest rate increases and faltering technical signals weigh on prices. The price of the yellow metal has fallen more than 1.5 per cent since the beginning of the month.

news.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona to support its AI coding assistant, Codex
news.summary: Ona's technology will allow OpenAI's coding assistant, Codex, to take on longer-running tasks, OpenAI said. Ona will allow Codex to do more than one task at a time.

news.title: Oracle shares tumble 11% on increased capital raise, cash concerns
news.summary: Oracle beat on earnings and revenue, but negative free cash flow and the company's plan to raise more capital is weighing on the stock.

news.title: A will isn’t enough: 3 ways to help your loved ones before you die
news.summary: There are countless ways to mess up estate planning — even if you’re organized. Here are a few tips to help you get the most out of your estate planning.

news.title: Brace for SpaceX’s stock to show ‘extreme’ volatility, a bullish analyst warns
news.summary: Early analyst coverage of SpaceX’s stock is starting to roll in now that the IPO is imminent. The IPO is expected to take place in the next few weeks.

news.title: Americans are trading Tuscany for Tacoma, thanks to soaring airfares
news.summary: Airfares have made it harder for price-conscious travelers to justify summer vacations in Europe. Many are opting to travel within the U.S. instead.

news.title: Oracle’s stock is seeing its worst run in a quarter-century as this key AI debate rages on
news.summary: Oracle's cloud-infrastructure business is growing rapidly. But a massive $95 billion spending plan and a physical bottleneck in data-center deliveries are giving investors pause.

news.title: ‘I feel like he may be taking advantage of us’: Our adviser pushes annuities after we already said no. Do we fire him?
news.summary: “I feel like he may be taking advantage of us,” she says. “I’m not sure what to do.”
